name: Conga Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 15x10x1 inch jelly roll pan.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Add butter to sugar, stir until sugar is dissolved.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in vanilla.
7. Add the flour mixture, beating well until smooth.
8. Stir in walnuts and chocolate chips.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
10. Cool. Cut into bars.
